allowed_action: Inspect Series and Sample metadata fields URLs and cross-references
forbidden_action: Download supplementary files sequencing reads or expression matrices
required_evidence: Exact sample fields patient/donor candidates diagnosis fields tissue assay batch treatment timepoint and repository links
expected_output: Source-preserving GEO field inventory and unresolved-field list

allowed_action: Inspect displayed file names formats sizes checksums and access notes only
forbidden_action: Retrieve open stream or extract any supplementary file
required_evidence: Metadata-only file inventory distinguishing metadata counts and processed objects
expected_output: File-manifest feasibility record with future gate requirements
notes: No file content may be downloaded

inspection_target: GSE137029 SRA Run metadata page or metadata-only manifest
allowed_action: Inspect Study BioProject BioSample Experiment and Run metadata relationships
forbidden_action: Download FASTQ SRA BAM or bulk-export run content
required_evidence: Run-to-sample relationships library metadata public attributes and cross-references
expected_output: Identifier relationship report or explicit unresolved status

allowed_action: Inspect methods tables supplements and data-availability statements already linked by audited notes
forbidden_action: Treat narrative cohort descriptions as patient-level linkage or retrieve full dataset assets
required_evidence: Explicit cohort definitions case/control definitions participant/sample counts and repository mappings
expected_output: Publication evidence summary separated from repository-level linkage

allowed_action: Inspect collection dataset publication ontology asset and provenance metadata
forbidden_action: Download H5AD or export cell-level data
required_evidence: Collection and dataset identifiers organism tissue assay disease terms asset types and source links

allowed_action: Inspect schema field names definitions ontology values and public summary metadata
forbidden_action: Retrieve expression matrices embeddings H5AD or full observation exports
required_evidence: Donor sample disease batch tissue assay cell-type and source field definitions with displayed completeness
expected_output: Dataset field inventory and provenance gaps

allowed_action: Inspect project donor specimen library file-format and repository cross-reference descriptions
forbidden_action: Download FASTQ H5AD count matrices or project file bundles
required_evidence: Project identifiers donor/sample descriptions repository links accessions and file-manifest summaries

allowed_action: Inspect field names definitions allowed values and public summary counts only
forbidden_action: Retrieve full cell metadata table or infer mappings from barcodes filenames or row order
required_evidence: Exact donor sample specimen and library fields relationships missingness summaries and disease linkage fields
expected_output: Metadata-only identifier and label field report
notes: Donor values visible in prior audit do not pass readiness

allowed_action: Compare explicit accessions projects collections datasets publications and source-supported donor/sample mappings
forbidden_action: Assume independence or overlap from similar counts titles or tissues
required_evidence: Documented correspondence or independence across study donor sample library and cell provenance
expected_output: Overlap decision evidence or explicit unresolved status
